data.name: Settings_Language_RestartRequired
data.value: Language set to {0}. Restart QuickMail to apply.

data.name: CommandPalette_CommandsListName
data.value: Commands. Arrow keys to navigate, Enter to run, Escape to close.

data.name: TabList_TabListName
data.value: Open tabs. Arrow keys to navigate, Enter to activate, Delete to close, Escape to cancel.

data.name: Tutorial_EscapeToSkipHint
data.value: Press Escape to skip the tutorial at any time.

data.name: Calendar_Announce_UnavailableOnline
data.value: Calendar is unavailable in online mode. It requires the local message cache.

data.name: Calendar_Announce_SourceMessageMissing
data.value: The original invitation email is no longer in your local message cache.

data.name: Calendar_Announce_OpenHint_One
data.value: Calendar. {0} upcoming event. Use Up and Down arrows to browse. Press Enter to open the invitation. Press T to filter to today. Press Escape to return to the folder list.

data.name: Calendar_Announce_OpenHint_Other
data.value: Calendar. {0} upcoming events. Use Up and Down arrows to browse. Press Enter to open the invitation. Press T to filter to today. Press Escape to return to the folder list.

data.name: KeyCapture_Announce_ConflictWarning
data.value: ⚠ Already assigned to: {0}. Select OK to reassign, Change to pick another, or Cancel to keep the existing binding.

data.name: Properties_Announce_CopyRowHint
data.value: Press Enter or Ctrl+C to copy the selected row.

data.name: GrabAddresses_SelectAddressesPrompt
data.value: Select addresses to add to your address book:

data.name: GrabAddresses_Announce_EnterNewGroupName
data.value: Enter a name for the new group.

data.name: GrabAddresses_Announce_DuplicateGroupName
data.value: A group named "{0}" already exists. Enter a different name, or pick the existing group from the list.

data.name: GrabAddresses_Announce_SaveFailed
data.value: Could not save addresses. See the log for details.

data.name: Settings_DeleteLog_ConfirmMessage
data.value: Delete the QuickMail log file? This cannot be undone.

data.name: NewFolder_FolderNameHelpText
data.value: Enter a name for the new folder

data.name: Settings_PreviewLines_Hint
data.value: Takes effect after reopening a folder.

data.name: Settings_ShowMessageStatus_AutomationName
data.value: Show message status column in message list

data.name: Settings_ConfirmEmptyTrash_AutomationName
data.value: Show a confirmation dialog before permanently deleting all messages in trash

data.name: Settings_ConfirmEmptyTrash_Hint
data.value: Recommended: emptying trash cannot be undone.

data.name: Settings_AutoSaveDrafts_AutomationName
data.value: Automatically save the message as a draft while composing

data.name: Settings_AutoSaveDrafts_Hint
data.value: Auto-save is quiet: the time of the last save shows in the compose status row. A failed save is announced once.

data.name: Settings_DefaultComposeMode_Hint
data.value: Drafts and templates always reopen in plain text.

data.name: Settings_CustomAnnouncements_AutomationName
data.value: Enable all custom screen reader announcements from QuickMail

data.name: Settings_CustomAnnouncements_Hint
data.value: When off, only native control announcements are spoken.

data.name: Settings_AnnounceHints_AutomationName
data.value: Announce instructional hints such as how to use the search box

data.name: Settings_AnnounceStatus_AutomationName
data.value: Announce background loading and sync progress

data.name: Settings_AnnounceResults_AutomationName
data.value: Announce outcomes such as search result counts and move confirmations

data.name: Settings_AnnounceSpellingWhileNavigating_AutomationName
data.value: Announce spelling errors when the caret moves into a misspelled word during navigation

data.name: Settings_AnnounceSpellingWhileNavigating_HelpText
data.value: Ctrl+F7 and Ctrl+Shift+F7 always announce spelling regardless of this setting

data.name: Settings_AnnounceSpellingSuggestions_AutomationName
data.value: Announce spelling suggestions when a misspelling is announced

data.name: Settings_VerbosityNumbersWithSuggestions_HelpText
data.value: Each suggestion is preceded by its number, for example: 1: the, 2: then, 3: them

data.name: Settings_VerbosityJustSuggestions_HelpText
data.value: Suggestions are read without numbers, for example: the, then, them

data.name: Settings_AnnounceFormattingWhileNavigating
data.value: Announce _formatting while navigating in HTML compose

data.name: Settings_AnnounceFormattingWhileNavigating_AutomationName
data.value: Announce block type such as heading level when the caret moves to a different paragraph in HTML compose mode

data.name: Settings_LogFormat_ActionFirst_HelpText
data.value: Message then timestamp — easier to scan since the log is already chronological.

data.name: Settings_LogFormat_TimeFirst_HelpText
data.value: Timestamp then message — the original log format.

data.name: Settings_KeyboardShortcuts_HelperText
data.value: Arrow to a command, then press Enter to assign a shortcut or Delete to restore the default.

data.name: Settings_RestoreDefault_AutomationName
data.value: Restore default shortcut for selected command

data.name: Settings_MessageOpenMode_Description
data.value: Choose where messages open when you press Enter or select one.

data.name: Settings_MessageOpenMode_ReadingPane_HelpText
data.value: Opens messages in the reading pane below the message list. This is the default behaviour.

data.name: Settings_MessageOpenMode_ReadingPane_Hint
data.value: Enter opens a message in the reading pane below the list.

data.name: Settings_MessageOpenMode_Tab_HelpText
data.value: Opens messages in a tab strip above the message list.

data.name: Settings_MessageOpenMode_Tab_Hint
data.value: Enter opens a message as a new tab. Ctrl+Tab cycles tabs. Ctrl+W closes.

data.name: Settings_MessageOpenMode_Window_HelpText
data.value: Opens each message in its own window.

data.name: Settings_MessageOpenMode_Window_Hint
data.value: Enter opens a message in a new window. Use Ctrl+Enter in any mode to always open in a new window.

data.name: Settings_ConfirmCloseTabWithUnsaved
data.value: _Confirm before closing a tab with unsaved changes

data.name: Settings_ConfirmCloseTabWithUnsaved_AutomationName
data.value: Show a confirmation dialog before closing a tab that has unsaved draft changes

data.name: Settings_HighContrastActive_Notice
data.value: Windows High Contrast is active; theme colors are supplied by Windows. Your theme choice below is saved and returns when High Contrast is turned off.

data.name: Settings_Theme_Hint
data.value: System follows the Windows light or dark setting. Themes can be managed, shared, and imported from the Theme Manager (Command Palette: Manage Themes).

data.name: Settings_ForceMessageTheme
data.value: Apply theme colors to message c_ontent

data.name: Settings_ForceMessageTheme_AutomationName
data.value: Apply theme colors to message content

data.name: Settings_ForceMessageTheme_Hint
data.value: Overrides the colors and fonts chosen by a message's sender. Turn on when messages arrive with hard-to-read colors.

data.name: ReportBug_PreviewLabel
data.value: Preview — exactly what will be sent:

data.name: Message_MoveToMainWindowToolbar_Name
data.value: Move this message to the main window as a tab

data.name: AddAccount_Password_HelpText
data.value: Password is stored in Windows Credential Manager

data.name: AddAccount_ICloudHint_Name
data.value: iCloud requires an app-specific password, not your Apple ID password. Generate one at appleid.apple.com under Sign-In and Security, App-Specific Passwords.

data.name: AddAccount_ICloudHint_Run2
data.value: Do not enter your Apple ID password. Generate one at

data.name: AddAccount_SignInMicrosoft_Name
data.value: Sign in with Microsoft account in browser

data.name: AddAccount_SignInGoogle_Name
data.value: Sign in with Google account in browser

data.name: AddAccount_SmtpUseSsl
data.value: Implicit _SSL on connect (port 465; uncheck for STARTTLS on port 587)

data.name: AddAccount_SmtpUseSsl_Name
data.value: SMTP implicit SSL on connect, port 465. Uncheck to use STARTTLS on port 587.

data.name: AddAccount_Signature_HelpText
data.value: This text is automatically added to the end of new messages, replies, and forwards

data.name: AddAccount_TestConnection_Name
data.value: Test IMAP connection with current settings

data.name: AddAccount_BackendSelected_NoImapSmtp_Announce
data.value: {0}. IMAP and SMTP settings are not required.

data.name: ThemeManager_ThemeList_Announce_PressTabForActions
data.value: Press Tab for actions on the selected theme.

data.name: ViewManager_EmptyStateHint
data.value: Select a view from the list, or create a new one.

data.name: ViewManager_CreateNewViewFromCurrentState
data.value: Create New View from Current State

data.name: ViewManager_ApplyViewToolTip
data.value: Activate this view and close the dialog

data.name: ViewManager_EditToolTip
data.value: Edit this view's name, shortcut, and options

data.name: ViewManager_SaveAsNewToolTip
data.value: Create a new view from current app state

data.name: ViewManager_SaveCurrentStateAsNewViewName
data.value: Save current state as a new view

data.name: ViewManager_KeyboardShortcutHint
data.value: Also configurable in File → Settings → Keyboard Shortcuts.

data.name: ViewManager_ShowAllMessagesName
data.value: Show all messages, no day limit

data.name: ViewManager_DayLimitFieldName
data.value: Day limit — number of days of mail to show

data.name: ViewManager_SaveButtonToolTip
data.value: Save current app state to this view

data.name: ViewManager_SaveCurrentStateToSelectedViewName
data.value: Save current state to selected view

data.name: ViewManager_Announce_FolderConflictMessage
data.value:
The current folder ({0}) is not in this view's folder list ({1}).
Yes = replace the existing folder(s) with {0} No = add {0} alongside the existing folder(s) Cancel = do nothing

data.name: RulesManager_BodyContainsHelpText
data.value: Text to search in message body preview

data.name: AccountManager_SetSelectedAccountAsDefaultName
data.value: Set selected account as default for new messages

data.name: AccountManager_PasswordHelpText
data.value: Password is stored in Windows Credential Manager

data.name: AccountManager_ICloudPasswordHintName
data.value: iCloud requires an app-specific password, not your Apple ID password. Generate one at appleid.apple.com under Sign-In and Security, App-Specific Passwords.

data.name: AccountManager_ICloudHintBody
data.value: Do not enter your Apple ID password. Generate one at

data.name: AccountManager_SignInMicrosoftName
data.value: Sign in with Microsoft account in browser

data.name: AccountManager_SignInGoogleName
data.value: Sign in with Google account in browser

data.name: AccountManager_SmtpImplicitSslCheckbox
data.value: Implicit _SSL on connect (port 465; uncheck for STARTTLS on port 587)

data.name: AccountManager_SmtpImplicitSslName
data.value: SMTP implicit SSL on connect, port 465. Uncheck to use STARTTLS on port 587.

data.name: AccountManager_SignatureHelpText
data.value: This text is automatically added to the end of new messages, replies, and forwards

data.name: AccountManager_TestImapConnectionName
data.value: Test IMAP connection with current settings

data.name: Compose_ChooseWhichAccountToSendFrom
data.value: Choose which account to send from

data.name: Compose_AddressBoxHelpText
data.value: Type an address and press comma, semicolon, or Tab to add it. Arrow keys navigate between addresses. Delete removes the focused address.

data.name: Compose_SaveDraftBeforeClosingMessage
data.value: Do you want to save this message as a draft before closing?

data.name: Compose_Announce_AlreadyInAddressBookFormat
data.value: {0} is already in your address book.

data.name: Compose_Announce_FormattingRequiresMarkdownOrHtml
data.value: Formatting commands require Markdown or HTML mode.

data.name: Compose_Announce_UnderlineNotAvailableInMarkdown
data.value: Underline is not available in Markdown. Use HTML mode for underline.

data.name: MainWindow_SaveViewName
data.value: Save current state as a view

data.name: MainWindow_ClearViewName
data.value: Deactivate the current view and return to folder navigation

data.name: MainWindow_SyncRangeToolTip
data.value: Choose how many days of mail to sync

data.name: MainWindow_SearchBoxToolTip
data.value: Search by sender, subject, or preview. Escape to clear.

data.name: MainWindow_UpdateStatusToolTip
data.value: Press Enter to open the release page in your browser

data.name: MainWindow_Announce_SearchBoxHint
data.value: Search box. Type to filter messages.

data.name: MainWindow_Announce_HighContrastOn
data.value: High contrast is on; colors are supplied by Windows.

data.name: MainWindow_Announce_PressEscapeToReturnToMessageList
data.value: Press Escape to return to message list.

data.name: MainWindow_Announce_TutorialComplete
data.value: Tutorial complete. You can replay it anytime from the Help menu.

data.name: MainWindow_Announce_TabStripHint
data.value: Ctrl+Tab for next tab, Ctrl+Shift+Tab for previous, Ctrl+W to close.

data.name: AddressBook_AddAllGroupMembersToTo
data.value: Add all group members to To

data.name: AddressBook_AddAllGroupMembersToCc
data.value: Add all group members to Cc

data.name: AddressBook_AddAllGroupMembersToBcc
data.value: Add all group members to Bcc

data.name: AddressBook_NoGroupsCreateOne
data.value: No groups — create one on the Groups tab

data.name: AddressBook_Announce_TypeNewGroupName
data.value: Type a new group name and press Enter. Press Escape to cancel.

data.name: AddressBook_Announce_RenameGroupFormat
data.value: Rename "{0}". Type a new name and press Enter. Press Escape to cancel.

data.name: SpellCheck_Completion_NoMisspellingsFound
data.value: The spelling check is complete. No misspellings were found.

data.name: SpellCheck_Completion_NoChangesMade
data.value: The spelling check is complete. No changes were made.

data.name: SpellCheck_Completion_WordsChanged_One
data.value: The spelling check is complete. {0} word changed.

data.name: SpellCheck_Completion_WordsChanged_Other
data.value: The spelling check is complete. {0} words changed.

data.name: SpellCheck_CompletionAnnouncement_NoMisspellingsFound
data.value: Spelling check complete. No misspellings found.

data.name: SpellCheck_CompletionAnnouncement_NoChangesMade
data.value: Spelling check complete. No changes made.
